B

BACKGROUND_WHITE - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The standard stark white backdrop surface fill applied across cards and primary components.
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<T> - Class in app.service.impl.anomalies
Concrete implementation of AnomaliesDetectionService that utilizes the Smile library's IsolationForest algorithm to detect structural deviations and anomalies within financial datasets.
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService() - Constructor for class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
 
BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel<T> - Class in app.gui.views
An abstract generic panel tasked with configuring parameters, triggering execution, and visually representing anomaly detection processes.
BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.views.BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel
Initializes the panel by configuring the flexible GridBagLayout, arranging the top control widgets, and preparing the bottom area dedicated to the chart plots.
BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService - Class in app.service.impl.anomalies
Concrete implementation of the BaseAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing raw sequential pricing data mapped to the DataRecord structure.
BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService() - Constructor for class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
 
BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService - Class in app.service.impl.anomalies
Concrete implementation of the BaseAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing computed technical analysis structures mapped to the FinancialIndicators dto.
BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService() - Constructor for class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
 
BoldLabel - Class in app.gui.components
A customized JLabel that forces its display text to be bold.
BoldLabel(String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.BoldLabel
Constructs a BoldLabel initialized with the specified text string.
buildDataRecordAnomalyDetectionService(String, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class app.service.AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory
Dynamically instantiates a specified anomaly detection service implementation for raw data records (prices) after verifying that the provided boundary constraints and application data states are fully valid.
buildFinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionService(String, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class app.service.AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory
Dynamically instantiates a specified anomaly detection service implementation for calculated financial technical indicators after verifying that the provided boundary constraints and application data states are fully valid.
